title: Complimentaries
description: Improving client-side Minecraft one mod at a time! Supports all the latest MC versions!
body:
## What it Does Complimentaries is a **client-side vanilla plus modpack** that aims to polish and add to some of the lacking/annoying features of Minecraft. It is meant to provide some basic client QoL features for players new to Minecraft mods. Some notable mods/resourcepacks included with this modpack are: - **[Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)**, allowing seamless resourcepack, shaderpack, and world installation without leaving the game - **[ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)**, allowing you to join any server regardless of version - **[Location Copy](https://modrinth.com/mod/locationcopy)**, allowing you to copy your coordinates by pressing a keybind - **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)**, allowing support for shaders to improve the look of Minecraft - **[Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)**, allowing you to record your Minecraft gameplay and edit it flawlessly ## Configuration No two people are the same, and that's especially true for mods! Almost every mod in **Complimentaries can be fully configured to your heart's content** and even flat out disabled. Simply click on the "mods" tab below Realms, find the mod you want to configure, and click on its profile picture to open its configuration screen. You can disable a mod by turning its "switch" off via Modrinth. You can even **install additional mods to the pack through Modrinth**. ## Mod and Version Compatibility Complimentaries currently supports **Fabric 1.21-1.21.8**, so any mod compatible with those versions can be installed to this modpack. Versions older than 1.21 and other modloaders are not a priority as of now, as many mods would be incompatible and I will prioritizing newer versions first. ## Server Compatiblity Many "vanilla plus" modpacks contain mods that some servers detect as cheats. However, none of the mods contained in Complimentaries modify the game to give any unfair advantages, and because of this, this modpack is **allowed on all servers**. ## Full Mod List Below is a list of every mod (including libraries) used in Complimentaries. Some mods may be unavailible in older versions of Minecraft.
⚙️Mod List (25)
  • 3D Skin Layers by tr7zw
  • AppleSkin by squeek502
  • BadOptimizations by thosea
  • Effect Timer Plus by TerminalMC
  • Essential Mod by SparkUniverse
  • Fabric API by modmuss50
  • Fabric Language Kotlin by modmuss50
  • FerriteCore by malte0811
  • ImmediatelyFast by RaphiMC
  • Iris Shaders by coderbot
  • LambDynamicLights by LambdAurora
  • Lithium by CaffeineMC
  • Location Copy by dukimi
  • Mod Menu by Terraformers
  • More Culling by FX
  • Reese's Sodium Options by FlashyReese
  • Resourcify by DeDiamondPro
  • ShulkerBoxTooltip by MisterPeModder
  • Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax
  • Sodium by CaffeineMC
  • Sodium Extra by FlashyReese
  • Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks by Rynnavinx
  • ViaFabricPlus by FlorianMichael
  • Where-Is-My-Stuff by AdelinaM17n
## Full Resource Pack List Below is list of every resource pack used in Complimentaries.
🌆Resource Pack List (3)
  • Low On Fire by Haikis
  • Low On Fire by Oculie
  • Ore Highlighter by SirKillian
## 🪲How to Report Bugs All modpacks are bound to have some bugs, so if you find any, be sure to click the "issue tracker" link and report them there. ## How to Suggest New Features I am entirely open to suggestions and find them very important! If you have any suggestions for what I can do to improve this pack, please join my Discord server (link below issues tracker).
